access_key_id.name: AWS S3 Storage - Access Key ID
access_key_id.remark: Cloud storage access key identifier used for authenticated requests.

path_prefix.name: AWS S3 Storage - Path Prefix
path_prefix.remark: Optional object key prefix applied to all uploaded files.

region.name: AWS S3 Storage - Region
region.remark: Cloud storage region code for the target bucket or container.

secret_access_key.name: AWS S3 Storage - Secret Access Key
secret_access_key.remark: Cloud storage secret key. Leave blank or masked to keep the existing value.
